modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cannot open Google Chrome due to configuration error.

full_description_text: 
The user was trying to launch the Google Chrome browser but encountered an issue. The application failed to start, and the error message indicated that its side-by-side configuration is incorrect. This means that there is a problem with how the application is set up to run alongside other applications. The user mentioned that they should check the application event log or use the command-line tool sxstrace.exe for more details, but they were unable to proceed with opening Chrome.
short_description: Cannot open Google Chrome due to configuration error.
description: The user was trying to launch the Google Chrome browser but encountered an issue. The application failed to start, and the error message indicated that its side-by-side configuration is incorrect. This means that there is a problem with how the application is set up to run alongside other applications. The user mentioned that they should check the application event log or use the command-line tool sxstrace.exe for more details, but they were unable to proceed with opening Chrome.
